privileged_info_summary: The soft_glow@1 task uses real portrait images from Unsplash (photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2 and photo-1531123897727-8f129e1688ce, both 687-688×1031 RGB JPEGs). The task applies GIMP's Filters → Light and Shadow → Softglow filter with recommended radius 10-15 pixels. The verifier checks four criteria: brightness increase of 5-20% in highlight regions (top 10% of pixels), edge strength reduction of 15-40%, glow halo detection using binary dilation with 5-pixel expansion and 5% brightness threshold, and overall image modification (≥3% of pixels with >20 intensity change). The task passes with 75% score (3 of 4 criteria). Data is non-synthetic (real Unsplash images).
